data.name: SystemDesign_FutureImprovementsDesc
data.value: The next meaningful steps to make this a production-grade AWS deployment.

data.name: SystemDesign_ImproveRdsTitle
data.value: Replace the PostgreSQL StatefulSet with Amazon RDS

data.name: SystemDesign_ImproveElastiCacheTitle
data.value: Replace the Redis Deployment with Amazon ElastiCache

data.name: SystemDesign_Decision1Title
data.value: Redis + Server-Sent Events for primes, not a plain HTTP response

data.name: SystemDesign_Decision2Title
data.value: Java 21 virtual threads instead of reactive programming

data.name: SystemDesign_Decision3Title
data.value: StatefulSet for PostgreSQL, Deployment for Redis

data.name: SystemDesign_Decision4Title
data.value: AWS ALB Ingress Controller over nginx ingress

data.name: SystemDesign_Decision5Title
data.value: OTel zero-code Java agent instead of manual instrumentation

data.name: SystemDesign_Decision6Title
data.value: Uno Platform WASM for the frontend

data.name: SystemDesign_ConfigHighlightsDesc
data.value: The source files below reflect a number of deliberate production-quality choices.

data.name: SystemDesign_SourceFilesDesc
data.value: Configuration files served directly — open in browser to view.
